title: Assistant Store Manager - Godrej Nature's Basket - Apply Now

jsonLd.title: Assistant Store Manager - Godrej Nature's Basket - Apply Now
jsonLd.description:
Godrej Nature's Basket is actively seeking a talented and motivated Assistant Store Manager to join our dynamic team in Nagpur. This is an excellent opportunity for professionals who are passionate about making a real impact in a fast-growing organization.

About Godrej Nature's Basket:
Godrej Nature's Basket is a leading organization in the Remote sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Assist in recruiting, onboarding, and performance management of staff
• Maintain high standards of store hygiene and cleanliness
• Handle customer queries, complaints, and escalations effectively
• Prepare daily sales reports and share insights with management
• Ensure visual merchandising standards are maintained at all times
• Coordinate with the supply chain team for timely stock delivery
• Ensure compliance with company policies and retail regulations

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• B.Com / M.Com / MBA Finance
• 10-15 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in KPI Management
• Proficiency in Category Management
• Proficiency in Loyalty Programs
• Proficiency in Sales Techniques
• Proficiency in Retail Analytics
• Proficiency in Omnichannel Retail
• Proficiency in SAP Retail
• Proficiency in Retail Operations

Work Mode: Remote - Work from anywhere in India

What We Offer:
• Comprehensive health insurance for self and family
• Professional development and training programs
• International travel opportunities for senior roles
• Work-from-home flexibility
• Competitive salary with performance-linked incentives
• Flexible working hours
• Salary Range: 20 LPA - 40 LPA per annum

Location: Nagpur, Maharashtra, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Godrej Nature's Basket!
